title: DelegationGrant (x402 STARK Receipt Format Extension, target shape)
description: Target shape for the DelegationGrant Claim, mapping to the fiscal_authority (x402-foundation/x402 issue #2405) seven-field qualification surface. The DelegationGrant is a six-element Claim: (subject, predicate, evidence, temporal_frame, revelation_mask, anchor). The shape extends a minimal delegator/delegatee/scope/expires_at struct with the cryptographic primitives that back bounded-spend authorization with cryptographic enforcement at use time. Canonical preimage discipline: JSON Canonicalization Scheme (JCS) per RFC 8785, hashed with SHA-256 (lowercase hex), per x402-foundation/x402 issue #2326 v3 canonicalisation discipline section.

canon_version.description: Canonicalisation discipline revision per x402#2326 v3. Two accepted forms : (a) `x402-jcs-v1.0.0` (explicit prefix, recommended for new emitters), (b) `1.0` or `1.0.0` (compact form, backward-compatible with `stark-vauban-pay-v1` Axis 1 fixtures on PR #2413).

subject.description: Subject of the Claim. For DelegationGrant, the user (delegator) who issues the grant.

kind.description: Subject kind. UserPseudonym = Poseidon(user_secret, app_domain, fresh_salt).

value.description: felt252 hex encoding (Starknet field element, 252-bit unsigned integer).

predicate.description: Predicate of the Claim. For DelegationGrant, the DelegationAuth predicate carrying cryptographic spend bounds.

delegate_pseudonym.description: felt252 pseudonym of the agent receiving delegation.

cap_per_tx.description: Maximum amount per single transaction, u256 as decimal string (integer base units, no float). Maps to fiscal_authority field 4 (spend cap).

cap_per_period.description: Maximum cumulative amount per rolling period_seconds window, u256 as decimal string.

period_seconds.description: Rolling window for cap_per_period enforcement, in seconds. Max 1 year.

allowed_merchants.description: Allowlist of merchant felt252 pseudonyms or addresses. Empty disallowed; use a wildcard sentinel if open-set semantics needed.

allowed_currencies.description: Currency identifiers using URN pattern (e.g. urn:eip3009:USDC:starknet-sepolia). Maps to fiscal_authority field 2 (asset + network).

delegation_nonce.description: felt252 anti-replay nonce. Committed (not Open) in the revelation_mask default.

max_chain_length.description: Maximum depth of grant chain (anti-inflation guard).

evidence.description: Cryptographic proof that the Predicate holds. For DelegationGrant, a STARK proof envelope over a DelegationStatement.

scheme.description: Evidence scheme discriminator. STARK proof envelope is the target. HMAC and SNIP-12 signature schemes are fallbacks for facilitator-internal and Starknet wallet typed-data signing paths.

statement_kind.description: Required when scheme = StarkProofEnvelope. Identifies the circuit family that produced the proof.

proof_bytes.description: Base64url-encoded proof bytes. Length depends on circuit (delegation-class circuits range approximately 120-200 KB).

vk_commitment.description: felt252 commitment to the verifying key (anti-VK-substitution discipline).

grantor_signature.description: Hex-encoded signature over the JCS canonical preimage of (subject || predicate || temporal_frame || delegation_nonce). Required when scheme = HmacPhaseMvp or SnipSignature.

temporal_frame.description: Temporal validity of the Claim. ValidityWindow with explicit t_start and t_end.

t_start.description: Validity start, Unix seconds. Maps to fiscal_authority field 4 (expiry start).

t_end.description: Validity end, Unix seconds. t_end = t_start + period_seconds. Maps to fiscal_authority field 4 (expiry end).

revelation_mask.description: Per-field disclosure policy (Open = plaintext on-chain, Committed = hash-only on-chain, Hidden = neither). Default mask: delegation_nonce Committed, rest Open.

anchor.description: On-chain commitment for the Claim. For DelegationGrant, the StarknetDelegation anchor publishes the delegation_commitment to the chain.

chain_id.description: Starknet chain identifier as felt252 hex. Sepolia: 0x534e5f5345504f4c4941 (ASCII SN_SEPOLIA).

delegation_commitment.description: felt252 commitment over (delegate_pseudonym || cap_per_tx || cap_per_period || delegation_nonce). Maps to fiscal_authority field 3 (approval source binding).

revocation_authority.description: URL or DID that publishes the revocation list for this delegation. Maps to fiscal_authority field 7 (revocation or dispute path).
